name: Pan American Silver Corp.
description: Pan American Silver Corp. is a leading mining company headquartered in Vancouver, Canada, focused on the exploration, development, and operation of silver and gold mines across the Americas. With a diversified portfolio of assets in countries including Mexico, Peru, Bolivia, and Argentina, the company aims to provide investors with significant exposure to silver while maintaining a commitment to responsible mining, sustainable development, and operational excellence. Pan American Silver produces a range of metals, including silver, gold, zinc, lead, and copper, supporting global needs for decarbonization and electrification through its innovative and efficient mining practices.
